# Fixture: christina_lewis_banned
# Model: haiku
# Duration: 8.5s
# Exit: 0
# Failures: 0

## CONVERSATION
Concierge: Hi Christina! Welcome to Shiftsmart. I'm your personal concierge here to help you get started!
Partner: It said my account I banned for what
Concierge: You'll need to submit a support ticket in the app so the team can investigate why your account was banned.
Partner: Can't login to app at all

## CONCIERGE OUTPUT
Email support@shiftsmart.com with your phone number and what the app is showing you. The team can look into your account from there.
